summary: Teaching focused on students, adapting complex concepts to each learner pace and context.
highlights: Explained complex concepts in a clear, student-centered way.
Solved learning bottlenecks by creating alternative teaching approaches when a method did not work.

summary: Managed and guided mixed-age high school groups to optimize explanation time, motivation, and goal achievement.
highlights: Organized students of different ages to optimize explanation time.
Applied creative teaching strategies to connect academic goals with everyday life.
Strengthened motivation and study habits to meet learning goals.

summary: Designed and implemented full-stack and hybrid app solutions, combining frontend performance, decoupled architecture, and agile delivery.
highlights: Implemented a full-stack solution (React/Node.js) and optimized REST API usage, achieving high UI responsiveness, visual fidelity, and reduced frontend loading times.
Designed content architecture in Strapi to decouple data management from presentation logic, enabling full autonomy for the content team while preserving data integrity.
Led the creation of a hybrid app (Ionic/React) in a continuous integration workflow, delivering essential features in short deadlines through precise agile coordination.
